meaning: n.冲电气(日本著名的电子公司)
examples: Well, OKI let's good for our health.
We expect to scale our use of the OVM to other project teams in OKI, reducing the time and cost to verify our high-quality products.
Japanese studio Nendo has completed its biggest-ever project: the exterior and interior renovation of a department store in Bangkok that founder Oki Sato believes represents a new way of shopping.
Oki Electric, by contrast, hews to the Japanese model of relying largely on organic growth.
Oki's top seven shareholders are Japanese financial institutions -- hardly angels of wealth creation.
